name: Sopa De Elote (Corn Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3 small ears corn (or 1 1/2 cups frozen whole kernel corn, thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh corn, cut kernels from cobs. Scrape cobs with a sharp spoon; discard cobs.
2. Measure corn. You should have about 1 1/2 cups. Reserve excess corn for another use.
3. Puree 3/4 cup corn in blender or food processor; set aside.
4. Mash garlic with salt to make a paste.
5. Melt butter in a large saucepan. Add onion and garlic paste. Cook until onion is tender but not browned.
6. Add tomatoes. Cook slowly for 10 minutes, mashing tomatoes with a spoon.
7. Add broth, oregano, pureed corn, and whole corn kernels. Taste and add salt if needed.
8. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
9. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
10. Stir in cream. Cook until heated through, but not boiling.
11. To serve, pour into soup bowls and garnish with cilantro or parsley. Makes 6 servings.
